Pre-conditions: User is on the login page
Test Steps: Enter valid credentials and click Sign In.
Expected Result: User should be logged in successfully.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page
Test Steps: Click Sign Up, fill details, and submit.
Expected Result: User account should be created successfully.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page
Test Steps: Click Sign In with Google and complete authentication.
Expected Result: User should be logged in via Google successfully.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page
Test Steps: Click Sign In with Microsoft and complete authentication.
Expected Result: User should be logged in via Microsoft successfully.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page
Test Steps: Click Forgot Password, enter email, and submit.
Expected Result: Password reset link should be sent to the email.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page
Test Steps: Enter password and click the eye icon.
Expected Result: Password should toggle between hidden and visible.

Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on the Homepage
Test Steps: Check the greeting message on the homepage.
Expected Result: Greeting message should be displayed based on the time (e.g., Good Morning/Afternoon <username>).

Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on the Homepage
Test Steps: Check for the 'Create new job' option.
Expected Result: Option to create a new job should be visible.

Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on the Homepage
Test Steps: Check the metrics section.
Expected Result: Metrics for Jobs this month, Image generated, and Cost saved should be displayed.

Scenario: Verify recent jobs and quick start sections
Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on the Homepage
Test Steps: Check for 'Recent jobs' and 'Quick start' sections.
Expected Result: Recent jobs and Quick start sections should be visible.

Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on the Homepage
Test Steps: View the 'Recent jobs' section.
Expected Result: Recent jobs should show details of the job with summary and status.

Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on the Homepage
Test Steps: View the 'Quick start' section.
Expected Result: Quick start should have options to start a new job and show job history.

Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on the Homepage
Test Steps: Check the top header menu options.
Expected Result: Top header should have options: New Job, Generate, Review, Deliver, Job, Day/night mode, User Profile & settings.

Scenario: Verify multiple sections in New Job tab
Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on the New Job tab
Test Steps: Check for the sections: Industry, Product Image, Targeting, Output Steps, Review Prompt.
Expected Result: All 5 sections should be visible one below another.

Pre-conditions: User is on the New Job tab
Test Steps: Go to Step 1 Select Industry and check available options.
Expected Result: User should be able to select from Automotive, 2 wheeler, Electronics, Furniture, Apparel.

Pre-conditions: User is on the New Job tab
Test Steps: Go to Step 2 Product Image and check upload options.
Expected Result: User should be able to upload images from local, url, or cloud storage.

Scenario: Verify Output File Prefix autofill based on Product Name
Pre-conditions: User is on the New Job tab
Test Steps: Select a Product Name in Step 2.
Expected Result: Output File Prefix should be autofilled based on the selected Product Name.

Pre-conditions: User is on the New Job tab
Test Steps: Go to Step 3 Targeting and check selection options.
Expected Result: User should be able to select 'who is this for', 'target market', and 'purpose'.

Pre-conditions: User is on the New Job tab
Test Steps: Go to Step 4 Output steps and select different configurations.
Expected Result: User should be able to select different configurations based on needs.

Scenario: Verify prompt creation based on input
Pre-conditions: User is on the New Job tab, inputs provided in previous steps
Test Steps: Go to Step 5 Review Prompt and check the generated prompt.
Expected Result: A prompt should be created based on input and visible to the user.

Scenario: Verify editing, saving, and using saved prompts
Pre-conditions: User is on the New Job tab, prompt is generated
Test Steps: Edit the prompt, save it, and try using a prompt from the saved library.
Expected Result: User should be able to edit, save, and use prompts from the saved library.

Pre-conditions: User is on the New Job tab
Test Steps: Check for action buttons at the end of the form.
Expected Result: Confirm and start generation' and 'Save draft' buttons should be available.

Pre-conditions: User is on the New Job tab, form is filled
Test Steps: Click on 'Confirm and start generation' button.
Expected Result: The job should be triggered and user redirected to the Generate Tab.

Scenario: Verify visibility of Step 1 and Step 2 in Generate Tab
Pre-conditions: User is on the Generate Tab
Test Steps: Check for the presence of Step 1 and Step 2.
Expected Result: Generate Tab should show Step 1 — Color variants, Step 2 — Lifestyle scenes.

Scenario: Verify grid generation and color update in Step 1
Pre-conditions: User is on Step 1 — Color variants in Generate Tab
Test Steps: View grid generation and try to update color by clicking on the image and selecting a color code.
Expected Result: Step 1 should show grid generation based on defined grid in New Jobs. User should be able to update color and regenerate.

Scenario: Verify lifestyle scene definition in Step 2
Pre-conditions: User is on Step 2 — Lifestyle scenes in Generate Tab
Test Steps: Try to define a lifestyle scene.
Expected Result: User should be allowed to define a lifestyle scene.

Pre-conditions: User is on the Generate Tab
Test Steps: Click on the 'Review All' button at the end.
Expected Result: User should be redirected to the Review tab.

Scenario: Verify image review and approval functionality
Pre-conditions: User is on the Review Tab with generated images
Test Steps: Review the generated image and click approve.
Expected Result: Image should be approved successfully.

Pre-conditions: User is on the Review Tab with generated images
Test Steps: Click on Fix Image color, make required changes and save.
Expected Result: Image color should be updated successfully.

Pre-conditions: User is on the Review Tab with generated images
Test Steps: Click on Share preview and enter user details.
Expected Result: Preview link should be shared with the user.

Pre-conditions: User is on the Review Tab with lifestyle images
Test Steps: Review lifestyle image and test approve, regenerate, and add lifestyle options.
Expected Result: User should be able to approve, regenerate, or add lifestyle to the image.

Pre-conditions: User is on the Review Tab and all images are approved
Test Steps: Click on 'go to delivery' button.
Expected Result: User should be redirected to the Delivery tab.

Scenario: Verify metrics display on the top
Pre-conditions: User is on the Delivery Tab
Test Steps: Check for the metrics on the top of the page.
Expected Result: Metrics for THIS JOB AGENCY PRICE, FREELANCER, and YOU SAVED should be displayed.

Pre-conditions: User is on the Delivery Tab
Test Steps: Check the section below the metrics.
Expected Result: A table of cost comparison should be displayed.

Pre-conditions: User is on the Delivery Tab
Test Steps: Check the section below the cost comparison table.
Expected Result: QA Result should be displayed.

Pre-conditions: User is on the Delivery Tab
Test Steps: Check the delivery package section.
Expected Result: Options to download zip, push to drive, and share link should be available.

Pre-conditions: User is on the Delivery Tab
Test Steps: Check the section below the delivery package.
Expected Result: Generation logs should be visible.

Scenario: Verify presence of Job history and Prompt Library
Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on the Jobs Tab
Test Steps: Check for Job history and Prompt Library sections.
Expected Result: Job history and Prompt Library sections should be visible.

Pre-conditions: User is on the Jobs Tab
Test Steps: View the Job history section.
Expected Result: Job history should show details of job and status.

Pre-conditions: User is on the Jobs Tab
Test Steps: View the Prompt library section and try to create a new prompt.
Expected Result: Prompt library should show details of prompt and allow user to create a new prompt.

Pre-conditions: User is logged in
Test Steps: Click on the day/night mode toggle button.
Expected Result: The UI should change to day/night mode based on the selection.

Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on User Profile and settings
Test Steps: Edit user information and save
Expected Result: Information should be updated successfully

Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on User Profile and settings
Test Steps: Change password and save
Expected Result: Password should be changed successfully

Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on User Profile and settings
Test Steps: Enable 2 factor authentication
Expected Result: 2 factor authentication should be enabled

Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on User Profile and settings
Test Steps: Change email notification settings
Expected Result: Email notification settings should be updated

Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on User Profile and settings
Test Steps: Toggle day/night mode
Expected Result: UI mode should change accordingly

Scenario: Verify configuring AI key and setting default AI key
Pre-conditions: User is logged in and on User Profile and settings
Test Steps: Configure AI key and set as default
